results.title: 10 LIVMAGAZINE.CA VANCOUV
results.description: Issue 01 of 2026 marks a confident opening chapter for LIV Magazine, capturing the rhythm of the West Coast through design, culture, and legacy. In the Okanagan, the story unfolds with the enduring elegance of Gray Monk Winery, alongside the sculptural brilliance of European Goldsmith Jewellery by Kim Berg. Precision aesthetics take centre stage at Oval Aesthetics, while hospitality history is honoured at the iconic Eldorado Hotel as it celebrates its 100th anniversary. Vancouver Island delivers a refined mix of heritage and modernity with the debut of The Bengal at the Fairmont Empress Hotel. Design and wellness are explored through Rayn Properties, Dr. Ken Smith at clinic805, Kinu Restaurant, ilio Sauna Co, and Finest at Sea’s relationship with Marilena Restaurant. In Vancouver, Blue Water Cafe celebrates 20 years of its Unsung Heroes menu, innovation takes shape with the Airble app, culture shines through Shen Yun, and fashion reaches its peak in a striking editorial with Eduardo Ramos, whose designs command the cover. Published by Mario Gedicke and led by Editor-in-Chief Helen Siwak, Issue 01 delivers a confident, cohesive portrait of modern luxury, defined by substance, vision, and place.

results.title: Trump's $1.8B Anti-Weaponization Fund echoes Obama's tactics that sent billions to left-wing allies
results.description: President Trump's $1.8 billion Anti-Weaponization Fund has drawn criticism as a slush fund for political allies — but in many ways it resembles Obama-era initiatives that steered billions of dollars to Democratic-aligned groups. The Obama Justice Department would sue large banks for discrimination and then divert the settlement funds to left-wing ...

results.title: Vance says Rep. Ilhan Omar is under DOJ investigation for immigration fraud ‘right now’
results.description: WASHINGTON — The Justice Department is investigating Rep. Ilhan Omar (D-Minn.) for possible immigration fraud, Vice President JD Vance revealed Tuesday. Omar has faced repeated questions over the years about her immigration status — as well as her family finances and potential ties to a COVID-era fraud scheme in Minnesota. “I don’t want to prejudge an investigation,” Vance told reporters at the White House. “It certainly seems like something fishy is there, but everybody’s entitled to equal justice under the laws.” “So we’re going to investigate it. We’re going to take a look at it. If we think that there’s...

results.title: Arsenal champions as Man City draw at Bournemouth
results.description: Arsenal’s 22-year wait for the Premier League title is over after rivals Manchester City drew at Bournemouth, in what is expected to be Pep Guardiola’s penultimate game in charge. Tuesday’s result on the south coast leaves Mikel Arteta’s men four points clear of City before the final round of games take place on Sunday, with [...] The post Arsenal champions as Man City draw at Bournemouth appeared first on Kahawatungu .
